titleStmt.title: SII 9.417: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 417. (A.R. No. 384 of 1927.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE MARGIN OF THE EAST VERANDAH OF THE PRAKARA OF THE KOTESVARA TEMPLE AT KOTESVARA, A SUBURB OF COONDAPUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1300, Piṅgaḷa, Kārtika, śu. 1, Mam[davāra], corresponding to A.D. 1377 October 3, Saturday; f.d.t. ·34, in the reign of Hariyappa, son of Vīra-Bukka. It states that Bommarasa was ruling the Bārakūra-rājya and records that the Mahāpradhāna Mudde-Daṇṇāyaka purchased three plots of land and made a gift of them and some gold for the offerings and other services of the god Kōtīśvara, for feeding 13 Brāhmans every day in the temple and for the wages of two women who waved chauris before the god. It also records that Muddaya-Daṇṇāyaka presented a frame of golden rods to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī
śakavaruṣa sāvirada mūnūṟaneya piṁgaḷasaṁvatsarada kārtika śu 1 maṁ . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara Arirāya
bhāṣege tappuva rāyara gaṁḍa śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrabukkapṛthvīśvarana kumāra hariyappama
jyādbhudayakāladalli śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ muddedaṁṇāyakaru kuḍukūra kōṭīśvara dēvaralli tatsaṁvatsarada puṣya
parāgapuṁṇyakāladalli māḍida dharmmake bārakūra rājyavanu boṁmarasaru Āḷuvalli koṁḍabāḷu Abhyaladani
ra kayyalu Arddhaparichēdavāgi koṭṭu mūlaparichēdavāgi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍabāḷina vivara
bāḷa catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu baḷābaḷiya bāḷiṁdalu paḍavalu teṁkalu ji(ṁ)mmakaṁbaḷiyu
lu heguṁjjiya gaḍiyiṁdalu baḍagalu paḍuvalu kiṁnikagāvaṁḍana bāḷiṁdalu mūḍalu kāṁdavegadeya bā
lu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷage Uḷḷaṁthā beṭṭu tiṭṭe hakkalu haḍalu holanu nela jala pāṣāṇa nidhi nikṣēpa
mane bāvi keṟe kaṇa makki mara nekki niḍilu Ā bāḷiṁge Uḷḷa holeyāḷu heṁṇāḷu gaṁḍāḷu kuṟuṭagaḷu saha janaṟa
yīḍu Ā bāḷiṁge Uḷḷaṁthā kāhu modalu Ā bāḷa sthānakke Uḷḷaṁthā mā(ṁ)nya dīpamāleya kaṁbha holeyara
baḷa kaḍuvāyi gāṇa māneṁṇe yī mariyādeyalu naḍadu bahudu Ā bāḷu yeraḍakkaṁ bittuva bede gēṇalu
gadalu makki mūḍe 30 mekke mūḍe 10 bayalu mūḍe 40 Aṁtu bāḷu nāgaṁḍugadalu bittuva mūḍe 80
ha gēṇi bhatta mūḍe yiṁnūṟa Āṟuvatta yēḷu Āre bhaṁḍasāliyiṁda bhatta mūḍe yepattu Ubhayaṁ mū
ḍe mūnūṟa mūvattayēḷu Āri Ā yīḍeraḍaṟa lekkadalu bārakūra śaṁbenavoṟe baha hāneyali vūra keyi
gaṁḍugadalu mūḍe nūṟamūvattaAyidu Ā bāḷiṁdalū baha mēlu hoṁnu kāṭagadyāṇa sā
yidu hoṁnu yī dharmavanu bārakūra hattu kēriya halara vasamāḍi yī bāḷanū mādhavakē
ṁge nāyaru mūlavāge bhaṁḍasāleyalu nāgaṁḍugadalu bhatta mūḍe yeppattu Āḷige
ṟasikoṁḍalli dēvarige naṁdādīvigege kaṭikoṁḍa gadyāṇa haṁneraḍu tuppakke gadyāṇa Āyidu hā
Āṟa haṇa Ele Aḍakege Eraḍu ho(ṁ)nnu Eraḍu haṇa Aṁtu kāṭigadyāṇa yippattu hoṁnu Ubhayaṁ
Eraḍakkaṁ Akki nāghaṁḍugadalu mūḍe nūṟamūvattayidu rokka kāṭigadyāṇa Aruvattaayidu
nū śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ mudedaṁṇāykaru kōṭīśvaradēvarige dharmava māḍi yī dharma ĀcaṁdrārkaThege is inserted above the line.
naḍena haṁge mādakeṟayaṁge nāyaru mūlavāgi koṭṭu Āmūḍa keṟeyanu śrīma(ṁ)nmahāpradhānaṁ muddeyadaṁṇā
yakkara mānisanu Āgi kuḍukūra kōṭīśvaradēvaralli Ācaṁdrārkavāgi naḍasuva dharmmada kaṭṭaḷe kōṭīśvaradēvara naivēdyake
dina Oṁdakkaṁ Akki nāḍa hāni mūṟaṟa lekkadalu tuppa soḷasi dēvara vīḷayakke Aḍake nālku Ele Eṇṭu naṁdādīvige
yiṣṭakke pratidina Oṁdakkaṁ Akkināḍa hāni Eraḍaṟa lekkadalu varuṣa Oṁdakke nāḍa hāni nālvattaṟa lekkadalu mūḍe
ttaidu tuppa dina Oṁdakkaṁ sūḍasiya lekkadalu varṣa Oṁdake tuppa teṁgu toṁbattakkaṁ kāṭi gadyāṇa Aidu vā
dēvara vīḷeyakke varuṣa Oṁdakkaṁ kāṭi gadyāṇa Eraḍu ho(ṁ)nnu Eraḍu haṇa naṁdādīvigege kāṭi gadyāṇa ha(ṁ)neraḍu hoṁ
beya hūvina māle Eraḍu Aṁttu dēvarige Ākki nāḍa hāni nālvattaṟa lekkadalu mūḍe yippattaĒḷu kāṭigadyāṇa yippatta
nū śrīma(ṁ)nmahāpradhānaṁ muddedaṁṇāyakkarū kōṭīśvaradēvaralli kaṭṭisida tsatrada maṭhadalli Uṁba brāhmaru Aḍige
māḍuva brāhmaru saha jana hadimūṟakkaṁ pratidina Oṁdakaṁ Akki nāḍa hāni Oṁbattu māna mū
ṟaṟa lekkadalu varuṣa Oṁdakkaṁ Akki nāḍa hāni nālvattaṟa lekkada mūḍe EṁbhattaĒḷū hāne mūvattu hesaṟu
tōve tuppa nālku pariya śāka vīḷeya saha pratidina Oṁdakkaṁ kāṭihaṇa Oṁdaṟa lekkadalu varuṣa Oṁdakkaṁ kā
ṭigadyāṇa nālvattaAyidu Ubhayaṁ brāhmarige Akki nāḍa hāni nālvattaṟa lekkada mūḍe EṁbhattaĒḷu ho
ratu kāṭigadyāṇa nālvatta Ayidu honnu kōṭīśvaradēvarige nayivēdyakke pratidina Oṁdakke Akki nāḍa hā
ni mūṟaṟa lekkadalu varuṣa Oṁdake hāni nālvattaṟa lekkada mūḍe IppattaĒḷu dēvarige cāmaravanikkuva he
mmakkaḷa jana Eraḍakkaṁ pratidina Oṁdakkaṁ Akki nāḍa hāne Eraḍaṟa lekkada varuṣa Oṁdakkaṁ Akki hāne
ttaṟa lekkada mūḍe hadineṁṭu A maṭhava bōharisuva basavittiya jana Oṁdakkaṁ varisa O
ṁdakkaṁ Akki mūḍe Eraḍū hāne hattu Aṁtu payika mūṟakkaṁ Akki hāne nālvattaṟa le
mūḍe nūṟamūvattaAyidu rūkka kāṭigadyāṇa ĀṟuvattaAyidu hoṁnu
nū śrīmanma(ma)hāpradhānaṁ muddayadaṁṇāyakaru kōṭīśvaradēvaralimāḍida
yīdharmmake Ā bāḷiṁda baha Akkiyanū hoṁnanū kōṭīśvaradēvarige taṁdusa
lsi Ā muddeyadaṁṇāyakaru māḍsi koṭṭa kanakadaṁḍada cavaka sadaka haḷatādaḍe
hosata māḍisuvanu dēvara pala vasatige haṟidaḍe hosa paṭṭigaḷa holsikkuḍu
vanu A tsatrakke koṁḍu koṭṭa Eṁme māṇsikoṁḍaḍe Eṁdū Eṁdū Ottu
bayanāgi Oṁdu Eṁmeyanū maṭhakke naḍasi bahanu .
Digital edition of SII 9.417 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
